tasks.label: Deploy Latest To GitHub Pages
args: cd "/Users/tranquocviet/Documents/Web báo cáo demo" && git add -A ':!server/telegram-bridge-state.json' && if git diff --cached --quiet; then echo 'No changes to deploy.'; else git commit -m "chore: auto deploy $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" && git push origin main; fi
